description: Black or White: Attempt to save White in the lower right or kill Black in the upper left. Note: I've omitted a number of variations, either because they weren't optimal play by the computer, or because they were continuations after you have clearly succeeded or failed. There's a lot of fun on this board, besides what's stated in this problem, and I'll leave finding it as an exercise to the reader. Enjoy!
